plan_analysis:
The pre-research context only tells us today’s Google Trends value (100) and the mechanical resolution rule.  
To make a good forecast, a forecaster still needs:

1. Base rate / historical volatility  
   • How has “dan serafini” search interest behaved in the past year?  
   • How often does a daily value move ±4+ points within an 11-day window when the first day is at or near 100?

2. Resolution mechanism details  
   • Any examples of SerpApi vs. in-browser discrepancies around day boundaries.  
   • Typical magnitude of day-to-day noise for low-volume names.

3. Key drivers  
   • Dan Serafini’s current legal timeline (he is a former MLB pitcher charged with murder). Court hearings, trial, sentencing, documentary releases, or media coverage could spike or drop interest.  
   • Whether 1 Mar 2026’s “100” is a one-off spike (e.g., a new article) or part of a continuing news cycle.

4. Current state / latest news  
   • Articles published since late February 2026 about Serafini’s case.  
   • Any scheduled court dates or public appearances between 2 Mar and 13 Mar 2026.

5. Contrarian checks  
   • Possibility that coverage abruptly fades (interest falls) or another story unexpectedly renews attention (interest rises again).

The eight queries below gather:  
• Historical Google Trends data and volatility statistics (Queries 1, 3, 5).  
• Documentation on how Google Trends scales values (Query 4).  
• Up-to-the-minute news about Dan Serafini’s legal case and media exposure (Queries 2, 6, 7, 8).

queries_planned.intent: Pull past-year daily interest values to measure typical ups/downs and identify past spikes.
Find any court dates or hearings scheduled during or just after the forecast window.

queries_planned.query: volatility of Google Trends daily values ±4 points 11-day window sports figures
queries_planned.intent: Compute base rate of >3-point moves for similar low-volume names, giving prior probabilities for Increase/Decrease/Flat.
Understand how locked-date scaling can still shift values, informing resolution risks.

queries_planned.query: Dan Serafini Google Trends 2023 spike causes
queries_planned.intent: Identify past events that produced large interest swings and their duration.
Check if sentencing or major decision is imminent.
See if a film/TV episode featuring Serafini will air in the forecast period.

queries_planned.query: Tahoe shooting victim Erin Blazier case update 2026
queries_planned.intent: Broaden search for related coverage that may influence search interest in Serafini indirectly.
